title: agathosma lanceolata
intro: Agathosma lanceolata, also known as the Cape Plume or Wild Rosemary, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Rutaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Agathosma lanceolata include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
